description: Single configuration record controlling the look and feel of the Salis Driver Portal (the mobile web app at /driver).

fields.description: Design theme applied to the driver portal. AFMCO is the flat, brand-aligned default; Frappe Standard is the neutral portal look; Dark is an AFMCO-flavoured dark mode.
fields.label: Theme

fields.description: Show the AFMCO brand mark and wordmark in the portal header. Turn off for a minimal, unbranded header.
fields.label: Show Brand

fields.description: Optional override for the primary accent colour. Leave blank to use the colour defined by the selected theme.
fields.label: Accent Color

fields.description: Optional logo shown in the portal header in place of the built-in brand mark.
fields.label: Brand Logo

name: Salis Portal Theme
